name: k9audit
description: Causal audit infrastructure for Claude Code. Records every agent action as a CIEU five-tuple including the intent contract Y*_t — answering the question no logger can: 'Did the agent see the constraint before it violated it?' Fully local, zero upload, cryptographic hash chain.

PreToolUse.description: Records intent contract Y*_t before every tool call

PostToolUse.description: Records observed effect and violation status after every tool call
